audit_items.proof_trace: The only resource acquisition in damon_get_page is the refcount increment via get_page_unless_zero. Due to C short-circuit evaluation, get_page_unless_zero is never called on the !page or first !PageLRU paths. If get_page_unless_zero returns 0, no refcount was acquired (atomic_inc_not_zero semantics). The sole path where a hold is acquired but the page is not returned triggers put_page on the second PageLRU check (L29-32), correctly releasing the hold.
